title: McpServer
description: AIBrain/mcp/servers/<id>.yaml — see MASTER_PROMPT.md canonical Brain layout

id.description: Stable slug, matches the parent mcp/servers/<id>.yaml file name

command_or_url.description: Launch command for stdio transports, or the endpoint URL for sse/http

env_placeholders.description: Env var names whose real values live in the OS keychain, never in this file

targets.description: Tool ids this server config is projected to
